name: Spotless Group Holdings Limited
description: Spotless Group Holdings Limited was a prominent Australian company that provided integrated facility services, including cleaning, security, catering, and facility maintenance, across Australia and New Zealand. Established in 1957, the company served a diverse range of sectors, including government, health, education, and resources. Spotless operated as a major provider of outsourced services until it was acquired by Downer Group in 2017. Following the acquisition, the company became a wholly-owned subsidiary of Downer, continuing its operations under the broader corporate structure of the Downer Group.
